title: Star Wars Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 2}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures02-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 2:
The Cavern of Screaming Skulls'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[November]] [[2002]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 2|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 2]], which was released in [[November]] [[2002]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=104 |isbn=0439458803 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]{{CSWECite|I|151|Cradossk}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series to a year before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner|Hunt the Sun Runner]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 3: The Hostage Princess|The Hostage Princess]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls''''' was the second installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 2|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 2]] in [[November]] [[2002]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''After the fallout of the ''Sun Runner'' incident, the Jedi are stranded in the jungles of Nallastia, where hostile natives send them on a quest to recover sacred gems said to hold the key to an ancient prophecy.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures02-Book.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures02-GameBook.jpg|Game Book cover
